title: Daewoo Electric Tin Can Opener SDA2313 Multifunction Knife Sharpener Bottle Opener, Hands Free 60W Black Silver
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: FREE STANDING - Perfect for a kitchen top but compact enough to be stored away, this free standing tin opener covers a number of kitchen jobs
HANDS FREE - Simply attach the can and the blade will do all the work, holding the can in place and smoothly removing the top
MAGNETIC - Clip on the can, let it run its course, then remove the tin, and the magnet will keep hold of the lid so you keep your fingers clean
AUTOMATIC STOP - Simple to use, once the blade has finished cutting it will automatically stop
MULTI FUNCTION - Not just for cans, the free standing tin opener also has a discreet knife sharpener and bottle opener
description: This free standing hands-free can opening from Daewoo features an automatic tin opener with magnet to hold the can for you, and retain the lid once it's been removed. The unit also features a discreet bottle opener and knife sharpener, making it a useful addition to any kitchen
